name: Holistiplan
ai_strategy_summary: Holistiplan holds 42% advisor adoption after 5 years — #1 tax planning software for advisors 5 consecutive years — using AI and OCR to analyze client tax returns in minutes and identify planning opportunities that previously required a specialist.
headline_metric: 42% advisor adoption; 8,000+ firms; #1 tax planning tool 5 years running
headline_initiative: AI + OCR tax return analysis that identifies planning opportunities in minutes

advisor_productivity.headline: Holistiplan analyzes client tax returns in minutes using AI and OCR — identifying tax-saving opportunities that previously required a tax specialist
advisor_productivity.detail: Holistiplan uses AI and OCR to analyze client tax returns in minutes, identifying tax-saving opportunities (Roth conversions, loss harvesting, charitable giving, etc.) and generating advisor-ready planning summaries. Used by 8,000+ firms and 42% of US financial advisors. Rated #1 tax planning software in T3/Inside Information survey for 5 consecutive years.
evidence: #1 tax planning software — T3/Inside Information Survey, 5 consecutive years
Tax return analysis in minutes vs. hours manually
Zocks integration (September 2025) extends meeting AI into tax planning
advisor_productivity.jpm_implication: Tax planning is one of the highest-value advisor services and also one of the most time-intensive. Holistiplan's 42% adoption proves advisors will pay for AI that makes tax planning faster. JPM advisors need comparable AI-assisted tax planning tools.

sources.name: Holistiplan — #1 tax planning software 5th consecutive year

operations_compliance.headline: Tax planning workflow automation integrated into CRM and meeting tools across 8,000+ advisory firms
operations_compliance.detail: Holistiplan integrates with major CRM and wealthtech platforms — including Zocks (September 2025) — to embed tax planning insights directly into advisor workflows, compliance documentation, and client review materials.
evidence: Zocks integration bringing meeting AI + tax planning together
Estate and insurance analysis modules added
operations_compliance.jpm_implication: The integration of tax planning AI into CRM and meeting workflows is setting a new standard for compliance-grade advisor operations. JPM's internal tools should benchmark against this.
